# Interpretive Governance
URL: https://interpretive-governance.org/

## Purpose
Doctrinal reference for bounded interpretation, constraint-first responses, and auditable machine outputs.
This site is intentionally non-operational: no scoring weights, no calibrated thresholds, no datasets, no execution tooling.

## Language entrypoints
- /en/ (English)
- /fr/ (Français - fr-CA)
- / (x-default selector)

## Key pages (English)
/en/principles
/en/architecture
/en/scope
/en/glossary
/en/author
/en/notes
/en/terms/external-authority-control

## Pages (Français)
/fr/principes
/fr/architecture
/fr/portee
/fr/glossaire
/fr/auteur
/fr/notes
/fr/termes/external-authority-control

## Machine surfaces (DualWeb)
- /ig-manifest.json
- /data/terms.json
- /data/documents.json
- /en/terms/ (English term pages)
- /fr/termes/ (French term pages)
- /.well-known/ig-manifest.json
- /.well-known/ig-terms.json
- /.well-known/ig-documents.json
- /sitemap.xml

## Canonical anchors
- https://gautierdorval.com/
- https://gautierdorval.com/.well-known/ai-governance.json
- https://github.com/GautierDorval/gautierdorval-identity

## Doctrine
Version: 0.2.0
Generated: 2026-03-02

## New doctrinal term
- External Authority Control (EN): /en/terms/external-authority-control
- External Authority Control (FR): /fr/termes/external-authority-control

## Adjacent regime
- https://interpretive-governance.org/en/terms/authority-governance-layer-3
- https://interpretive-governance.org/fr/termes/authority-governance-layer-3
- https://interpretive-governance.org/en/notes#layer-3-boundary
- https://interpretive-governance.org/fr/notes#frontiere-layer-3
Authority Governance (Layer 3) constrains executable authority. It is adjacent to, not a replacement for, open-web interpretive governance.
